login.title: MyNetTax
login.description: Sign in or create your account to continue

partners.description: Here is a list of trusted, FCA-regulated partners you can be handed off to for advice.

submission.description: Calculate and submit your tax return to HMRC.

reports.description: Generate custom reports based on your financial data.
reports.mortgage_description: Generate a PDF summary of your income over the last 12 months. This can be useful when applying for a mortgage.

documents.description: Upload and manage your receipts and invoices.
documents.search_description: Ask a question about your documents in natural language.
documents.search_placeholder: e.g., 'where did I buy coffee last month?'
documents.uploaded_documents_count: {count, plural, =0 {No uploaded documents yet.} one {# uploaded document} other {# uploaded documents}}
documents.review_queue_count: {count, plural, =0 {No documents currently require manual OCR review.} one {# document requires manual OCR review.} other {# documents require manual OCR review.}}

onboarding.title: Welcome to MyNetTax
onboarding.subtitle: Tax readiness for UK self-employed workers
onboarding.step1_body: Securely link your bank account. MyNetTax reads transactions — it never moves money.
onboarding.step2_body: Categorise your income and expenses. We guide you, step by step.
onboarding.step3_body: See your readiness score and fix any blockers before your deadline.
onboarding.step4_body: If you work in construction, track every deduction and claim what you are owed.
onboarding.not_advice: MyNetTax provides guidance, not professional tax advice. Consult a qualified accountant for your specific situation.

readiness.title: Quarter Readiness
readiness.blocker_stale_sync: Bank sync is out of date
readiness.empty_ready_body: All transactions are reviewed and categorised.
readiness.not_advice: Readiness scores are based on data you have provided. This is not professional tax advice.

mtd.title: Making Tax Digital
mtd.confirm_acknowledgement: I confirm this quarterly update is true and complete to the best of my knowledge.
mtd.submitted_body: Your quarterly update has been submitted. Reference: {reference}
mtd.error_hmrc_unavailable: HMRC services are temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
mtd.error_duplicate: This period has already been submitted.
mtd.not_advice: MyNetTax prepares your submission data. You are responsible for confirming that figures are accurate before submitting to HMRC.

cis.title: CIS Refund Tracker
cis.subtitle: Construction Industry Scheme
cis.evidence_pack_body: Share a verified summary with your accountant.
cis.unverified_warning: Some CIS deductions are unverified. You can still submit, but your accountant will need to confirm these before your final declaration.
cis.not_advice: CIS refund estimates are based on records you have provided. Contact HMRC or a qualified accountant to confirm your entitlement.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.server: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again shortly.
errors.auth_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.not_found: This page or record could not be found.
errors.validation: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.hmrc_429: HMRC is rate-limiting requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.hmrc_oauth: HMRC authorisation failed. Please re-authorise and try again.
